name: Mintlify OSS Program
description: Non-commercial open source projects get Mintlify's Pro plan for free (normally $300/month), including custom domains, advanced analytics, API playground, AI chat, and version control.

perks.title: Free Pro Plan
perks.description: Full access to the Pro plan at no cost (normally $300/month) for qualifying non-commercial open source projects.

perks.title: Custom Domains & Branding
perks.description: Present documentation under your own domain with custom branding and styling.

perks.title: Advanced Analytics
perks.description: Understand how users interact with your documentation and identify improvement opportunities.

perks.title: API Playground
perks.description: Interactive API documentation with live testing capabilities for your endpoints.

perks.title: AI Chat & Version Control
perks.description: Pro features including AI chat, version control, and advanced components for world-class documentation.

eligibility: Open source with a recognized OSS license (MIT, Apache 2.0, GPL, etc.).
Not owned or primarily maintained by a for-profit company.
applicationProcess: Apply through the Mintlify OSS Program page.
Mintlify reviews the application for eligibility.
